label: Artificial intelligence by NACE Rev. 2 activity

size_emp.label: Size classes in number of persons employed

nace_r2.label: Statistical classification of economic activities in the European Community (NACE Rev. 2)

label.C-F: Manufacturing, electricity, gas, steam and air conditioning supply; water supply and construction
label.C-E: Manufacturing, electricity, gas, steam and air conditioning; water supply, sewerage, waste management and remediation activities
label.C10-S951_X_K: All activities (except agriculture, forestry and fishing, and mining and quarrying), without financial sector
label.C10-C18: Manufacture of products based on: food, beverages, tobacco, textile, leather, wood, pulp and paper; publishing and printing
label.C10-C12: Manufacture of food products; beverages and tobacco products
label.C13-C15: Manufacture of textiles, wearing apparel, leather and related products
label.C16-C18: Manufacture of wood, paper, printing and reproduction
label.C19-C23: Manufacture of coke, refined petroleum, chemical and basic pharmaceutical products, rubber and plastics, other non-metallic mineral products
label.C19: Manufacture of coke and refined petroleum products
label.C20: Manufacture of chemicals and chemical products
label.C21: Manufacture of basic pharmaceutical products and pharmaceutical preparations
label.C22_C23: Manufacture of rubber and plastic products and other non-metallic mineral products
label.C24_C25: Manufacture of basic metals and fabricated metal products, except machinery and equipment
label.C26-C33: Manufacture of computers, electric and optical products, electrical equipment, machinery and equipment n.e.c, motor vehicles, other transport equipment, furniture, other manufacturing, repair and installation of machinery and equipment
label.C26: Manufacture of computer, electronic and optical products
label.C27_C28: Manufacture of electrical equipment, machinery and equipment n.e.c.
label.C28: Manufacture of machinery and equipment n.e.c.
label.C29_C30: Manufacture of motor vehicles, trailers, semi-trailers and of other transport equipment
label.C31-C33: Manufacture of furniture; jewellery, musical instruments, toys; repair and installation of machinery and equipment
label.D_E: Electricity, gas, steam and air conditioning supply; water supply; sewerage, waste management and remediation activities
label.D: Electricity, gas, steam and air conditioning supply
label.D35: Electricity, gas, steam and air conditioning supply
label.E: Water supply; sewerage, waste management and remediation activities
label.G: Wholesale and retail trade; repair of motor vehicles and motorcycles
label.G45: Wholesale and retail trade and repair of motor vehicles and motorcycles
label.G46: Wholesale trade, except of motor vehicles and motorcycles
label.G47: Retail trade, except of motor vehicles and motorcycles
label.J58-J60: Publishing, motion picture, video, television programme production; sound recording, programming and broadcasting activities
label.J62_J63: Computer programming, consultancy, and information service activities
label.L_M: Real estate activities; professional, scientific and technical activities
label.M69-M71: Legal and accounting activities; activities of head offices; management consultancy activities; architectural and engineering activities; technical testing and analysis
label.M73-M75: Advertising and market research; other professional, scientific and technical activities; veterinary activities
label.N77-N82_X_N79: Activities for rental and leasing, employment, security and investigation, services to buildings and landscape, office administrative, office support and other business support
label.N79: Travel agency, tour operator and other reservation service and related activities
label.S951: Repair of computers and communication equipment

label.E_AI_TTM: Enterprises using AI technologies performing analysis of written language (text mining)
label.E_AI_TSR: Enterprises using AI technologies converting spoken language into machine-readable format (speech recognition)
label.E_AI_TNLG: Enterprises using AI technologies generating written or spoken language or programming codes (natural language generation, speech synthesis)
label.E_AI_TIR: Enterprises using AI technologies identifying objects or persons based on images (image recognition, image processing)
label.E_AI_TML: Enterprises using machine learning (e.g. deep learning) for data analysis
label.E_AI_TPA: Enterprises using AI technologies automating different workflows or assisting in decision making (AI based software robotic process automation)
label.E_AI_TAR: Enterprises using AI technologies enabling physical movement of machines via autonomous decisions based on observation of surroundings (autonomous robots, self-driving vehicles, autonomous drones)
label.E_AI_TANY: Enterprises using at least one of the AI technologies: AI_TTM, AI_TSR, AI_TNLG, AI_TIR, AI_TML, AI_TPA, AI_TAR, E_AI_TPVSG
label.E_AI_TX: Enterprises don't use any of the AI technologies: AI_TTM, AI_TSR, AI_TNLG, AI_TIR, AI_TML, AI_TPA, AI_TAR, E_AI_TPVSG
label.E_AI_TGE2: Enterprises using at least two of the AI technologies: AI_TTM, AI_TSR, AI_TNLG, AI_TIR, AI_TML, AI_TPA, AI_TAR, E_AI_TPVSG
label.E_AI_TGE3: Enterprises using at least three of the AI technologies: AI_TTM, AI_TSR, AI_TNLG, AI_TIR, AI_TML, AI_TPA, AI_TAR, E_AI_TPVSG
label.E_AI_PMS: Enterprises using AI technologies for marketing or sales
label.E_AI_PPP: Enterprises using AI technologies for production processes
label.E_AI_PBA: Enterprises using AI technologies for organisation of business administration processes
label.E_AI_PME: Enterprises using AI technologies for management of enterprises
label.E_AI_PLOG: Enterprises using AI technologies for logistics
label.E_AI_PITS: Enterprises using AI technologies for ICT security
label.E_AI_PHR: Enterprises using AI technologies for human resources management or recruiting
label.E_AI_ADOWN: Enterprises' AI technologies were developed by own employees
label.E_AI_AMOWN: Enterprises' AI technologies were commercial software or systems modified by own employees
label.E_AI_AOS: Enterprises' AI technologies were open-source software or systems modified by own employees
label.E_AI_ARDY: Enterprises' AI technologies were commercial software or systems ready to use
label.E_AI_AEXT: Enterprises' AI technologies were  developed or modified by external providers
label.E_AI_EC: Enterprises that ever considered to use one of the AI technologies: AI_TTM, AI_TSR, AI_TNLG, AI_TIR, AI_TML, AI_TPA, AI_TAR, E_AI_TPVSG
label.E_AI_BCST: Enterprises do not use AI technologies, because the costs seem too high
label.E_AI_BLE: Enterprises do not use AI technologies, because of a lack of relevant expertise
label.E_AI_BINC: Enterprises do not use AI technologies, because of incompatibility with existing equipment, software or systems
label.E_AI_BDDT: Enterprises do not use AI technologies, because of difficulties with availability or quality of the necessary data
label.E_AI_BCDP: Enterprises do not use AI technologies, because of concerns regarding violation of data protection and privacy
label.E_AI_BLEG: Enterprises do not use AI technologies, because of a lack of clarity about the legal consequences
label.E_AI_BEC: Enterprises do not use AI technologies, because of ethical considerations
label.E_AI_BNU: Enterprises do not use AI technologies, because artificial Intelligence technologies are not useful for Enterprise
label.E_AI_DA: Enterprises use AI technologies and perform data analytics
label.E_AI_CC: Enterprises use AI technologies and buy any cloud computing services used over the internet
label.E_AI_CC1SI_DASANY: Enterprises use AI technologies or buy sophisticated or intermediate cloud computing services or perform data analytics on data from any source
label.E_AI_CC1SI_DASGE3: Enterprises use AI technologies or buy sophisticated or intermediate cloud computing services or perform data analytics on data from at least three sources
label.E_AI_CC1SI_DASANY2: Enterprises use AI technologies or buy sophisticated or intermediate cloud computing services or perform data analytics on data from any source among E_DASWEB, E_DASLOC, E_DASSDS, E_DASGOV and E_DASSAT
label.E_AI_CC1SI_DA_ANY: Enterprises use AI technologies or buy sophisticated or intermediate cloud computing services or perform data analytics
label.E_AI_CC1SI_DA: Enterprises use AI technologies and buy sophisticated or intermediate cloud computing services and perform data analytics
label.E_AIX_CC1SI_DA: Enterprises buy sophisticated or intermediate cloud computing services and perform data analytics, but don't use AI technologies
label.E_AI_CC1SIX_DA: Enterprises use AI technologies and perform data analytics, but don't buy sophisticated or intermediate cloud computing services
label.E_AI_CC1SI_DAX: Enterprises use AI technologies and buy sophisticated or intermediate cloud computing services, but don't perform data analytics
label.E_AIX_CC1SIX_DA: Enterprises perform data analytics, but don't use AI technologies and don't buy sophisticated or intermediate cloud computing services
label.E_AIX_CC1SI_DAX: Enterprises buy sophisticated or intermediate cloud computing services, but don't use AI technologies and don't perform data analytics
label.E_AI_CC1SIX_DAX: Enterprises use AI technologies, but don't buy sophisticated or intermediate cloud computing services and don't perform data analytics
label.E_AI_PBAM: Enterprises using AI technologies for organisation of business administration processes or management
label.E_AI_PFIN: Enterprises using AI technologies for accounting, controlling or finance management
label.E_AI_PRDI: Enterprises using AI technologies for research and development (R&D) or innovation activity
label.E_AI_P1ANY: Enterprises using AI technologies for at least one of the purposes: AI_PMS, AI_PPP, AI_PBAM, AI_PLOG, AI_PITS, AI_PFIN, AI_PRDI
label.E_AI_P1GE2: Enterprises using AI technologies for at least two of the purposes: AI_PMS, AI_PPP, AI_PBAM, AI_PLOG, AI_PITS, AI_PFIN, AI_PRDI
label.E_AI_P1GE3: Enterprises using AI technologies for at least three of the purposes: AI_PMS, AI_PPP, AI_PBAM, AI_PLOG, AI_PITS, AI_PFIN, AI_PRDI
label.E_DI3_VLO_AI_TANY: Enterprises with very low digital intensity index, which use any artificial intelligence technology
label.E_DI3_LO_AI_TANY: Enterprises with low digital intensity index, which use any artificial intelligence technology
label.E_DI3_HI_AI_TANY: Enterprises with high digital intensity index, which use any artificial intelligence technology
label.E_DI3_VHI_AI_TANY: Enterprises with very high digital intensity index, which use any artificial intelligence technology
label.E_AI_PDI: Enterprises which process data on individuals using AI technologies
label.E_AI_BIAS: Enterprises which have measures to check the results generated by AI technologies for possible biases towards individuals
label.E_AI_BIAS_ADOWN: Enterprises which have measures to check the results generated by AI for possible biases towards individuals, and their AI technologies were developed by own employees
label.E_AI_BIAS_AMOWN: Enterprises which have measures to check the results generated by AI for possible biases towards individuals, and their AI technologies were commercial software or systems modified by own employees
label.E_AI_BIAS_AOS: Enterprises which have measures to check the results generated by AI for possible biases towards individuals, and their AI technologies were open-source software or systems modified by own employees
label.E_AI_BIAS_ARDY: Enterprises which have measures to check the results generated by AI for possible biases towards individuals, and their AI technologies were purchased commercial software or systems ready to use
label.E_AI_BIAS_AEXT: Enterprises which have measures to check the results generated by AI for possible biases towards individuals, and their AI technologies were developed or modified by external providers
label.E_AI_TPVSG: Enterprises using AI technologies generating pictures, videos, sound/audio

label.PC_ENT_IUSE: Percentage of enterprises where persons employed have access to the internet
label.PC_ENT_AI_EC: Percentage of the enterprises which ever considered to use any of the AI technologies
label.PC_ENT_AI_TANY: Percentage of the enterprises using at least one AI technologies
label.PC_ENT_AI_TX: Percentage of the enterprises using no AI technologies
label.PC_ENT_AI_PDI: Percentage of the enterprises which process data on individuals using AI technologies

label.bu: break in time series, low reliability
